title: CodeGrind improvements: CI/CD, AI assistant upgrades, and security tweaks
summary: Showcase recent CodeGrind updates: CI/CD polish, Azure OpenAI integration enhancements, and streamlined authentication with Google sign-in.
core_message: CodeGrind continues to evolve with robust CI/CD improvements, enhanced Azure OpenAI assistance, and a more seamless Google authentication flow. This campaign highlights the reliability, accessibility, and smarter support that users get as they practice DSA through our gamified platform.
cta: Explore the latest CodeGrind updates and try the improved AI-assisted problem solving and secure sign-in today.
visual_brief: Static announcement-style graphic featuring CodeGrind UI elements: a clean dashboard mockup, a highlighted AI assistant chat panel, and a prominent Google sign-in button. Include subtle cyberpunk accents and a badge for CI/CD improvements.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
